query:
-- Apollo credit usage in last 7 days
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as day,
  COUNT(*) as calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN emailFound IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as emails_found,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as credits_used
FROM apolloEnrichmentLog
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY day DESC;
